routes.users module¶

Users Routes Module¶

This module defines the API endpoints for user profile management, specifically handling avatar uploads via Cloudinary integration.

routes.users.update_avatar_user(file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<services.auth.RoleChecker object>, use_cache=True, scope=None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Updates the avatar for the currently authenticated administrator.

The image is uploaded to Cloudinary, and the resulting URL is stored in the user’s database record.

Parameters:

  • file (UploadFile) – The image file to be uploaded.

  • current_user (User) – The currently authenticated user (must have admin role).

  • db (Session) – The database session.

Returns:

The updated user profile with the new avatar URL.

Return type:

User
